title: Add platform-agnostic gesture recognition system (SKGestureDetector + SKGestureTracker)
body:
## Summary

Adds a complete, platform-agnostic gesture recognition system to `SkiaSharp.Extended` with 15 new source files, 11 test files (181 tests), comprehensive docs, and Blazor + MAUI sample apps.

## Staging

- 📖 [Staging Documentation](https://mono.github.io/SkiaSharp.Extended/staging/326/)
- 🎮 [Staging Blazor Sample](https://mono.github.io/SkiaSharp.Extended/staging/326/sample/)

## Architecture

Two-layer design — both in core `SkiaSharp.Extended` (netstandard2.0 + net9.0), no platform dependencies:

- **`SKGestureDetector`** — low-level state machine (None → Detecting → Panning/Pinching). Processes raw touch input and fires discrete gesture events. Uses `TimeProvider` for deterministic testing.
- **`SKGestureTracker`** — high-level wrapper that manages a cumulative `SKMatrix` transform (pan/zoom/rotate), runs fling and double-tap-zoom animations, provides drag lifecycle, and feature toggles.

```
SkiaSharp.Extended (Core)
└── Gestures/
    ├── SKGestureDetector.cs           # Touch → gesture state machine (679 lines)
    ├── SKGestureDetectorOptions.cs    # Detection thresholds (slop, timing, velocity)
    ├── SKGestureTracker.cs            # Gesture → transform matrix + animations (931 lines)
    ├── SKGestureTrackerOptions.cs     # Scale limits, zoom, fling, scroll config
    ├── SKFlingTracker.cs              # Velocity estimation for fling
    ├── SK*GestureEventArgs.cs (8)     # Typed EventArgs for each gesture
    └── SKGestureLifecycleEventArgs.cs # GestureStarted/Ended lifecycle
```

## Supported Gestures

| Gesture | Events | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Tap | `TapDetected` | Single finger, fires on release |
| Double Tap | `DoubleTapDetected` | Configurable slop + timing |
| Long Press | `LongPressDetected` | Timer-based, configurable duration |
| Pan | `PanDetected` | Single finger drag with location tracking |
| Pinch | `PinchDetected` | Two+ finger scale with focal point |
| Rotate | `RotateDetected` | Two+ finger rotation |
| Fling | `FlingDetected/Updated/Completed` | Momentum animation with configurable friction |
| Drag | `DragStarted/Updated/Ended` | App-level object dragging lifecycle |
| Scroll | `ScrollDetected` | Mouse wheel zoom |
| Hover | `HoverDetected` | Mouse movement without contact |

## Key Design Decisions

- **Coordinate-space-agnostic**: The tracker operates on whatever numbers you pass in. MAUI passes device pixels directly; Blazor multiplies CSS pixels by `devicePixelRatio`.
- **(0,0) matrix origin**: Transform uses `Scale · Rotate · Translate(offset)` — no view-center dependency. `SetScale`/`SetRotation` accept an optional `pivot` parameter.
- **Options pattern**: All thresholds in `SKGestureDetectorOptions` (detection) and `SKGestureTrackerOptions` (tracking), with full validation.
- **Feature toggles**: Each gesture type can be enabled/disabled at runtime via `Is*Enabled` properties.
- **Handled pattern**: `Handled` property on tap/drag/pan EventArgs allows consumers to intercept gestures (e.g., `DragStarted.Handled = true` suppresses pan).
- **Sealed classes**: Both `SKGestureDetector` and `SKGestureTracker` are sealed — no fragile base class issues, clean Dispose without `Dispose(bool)`.

## Test Coverage

**181 tests** across 11 files covering:
- All gesture recognition paths and state transitions
- Options validation (all `ArgumentOutOfRangeException` checks)
- EventArgs property verification with exact expected values
- Multi-touch transitions (1↔2↔3 fingers)
- Feature toggle behavior
- Edge cases: cancel during gestures, double-dispose safety, touch ID reuse, boundary conditions
- Fling/zoom animation mechanics

## Documentation

- **Quick start**: `docs/docs/gestures.md`
- **Event reference**: `docs/docs/gesture-events.md`
- **Configuration guide**: `docs/docs/gesture-configuration.md`
- **Full XML documentation** on all public types, properties, events, and methods

## Samples

- **MAUI**: `samples/SkiaSharpDemo/Demos/Gestures/` — multi-sticker canvas with pan/zoom/rotate/fling, full settings panel with all options
- **Blazor**: `samples/SkiaSharpDemo.Blazor/Pages/Gestures.razor` — complete gesture demo with pointer events, configurable settings panel

## Files Changed

41 files changed, +8,286 lines
- 15 new source files in `source/SkiaSharp.Extended/Gestures/`
- 11 test files in `tests/SkiaSharp.Extended.Tests/Gestures/`
- 3 documentation pages + TOC update
- 5 sample files (Blazor) + 3 sample files (MAUI)
- PR monitor skill (`.github/skills/pr-monitor/`)
